items.title: fix(config): preserve $schema field across config rewrites (#47322)
items.summary: fix(config): preserve $schema field across config rewrites (#47322) * fix(config): preserve \$schema field across config rewrites Add \$schema to the OpenClawConfig TypeScript type so it survives the config write-back cycle. The Zod schema already accepted it (added in #14998) but the TypeScript type omitted it, causing the field to be silently stripped during config serialization. Adds a round-trip test through validateConfigObject to prevent regression. Closes #43578 * fix(config): preserve root $schema during partial writes * fix(config): preserve root $schema only when omitted * fix(config): preserve root-authored $schema only --------- Co-authored-by: Altay
